patch.value:
## Defect
MERGE_SAFETY.md (PR#617) recommended `pm config set project ids.token_length 6`. The config grammar puts the scope BEFORE the verb (`pm config project set <key> <value>`), so the documented command parses "project" as the key and exits 2 with invalid_argument_value — an agent following the merge-safety guidance hits a guaranteed usage error at the exact moment it is adopting collision safety. Canonical form used everywhere else in docs/CONFIGURATION.md: `pm config project set ids_token_length 6` (scope-first; `pm config set <dotted.or.underscore.key>` without scope also works and defaults to project scope).

## Fix
Both sites corrected to the canonical scope-first form: docs/MERGE_SAFETY.md entropy-budget bullet + docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md multi-branch section.
MERGE_SAFETY.md documented an invalid config invocation: 'pm config set project ids.token_length 6' exits 2 (scope must precede the verb)
MERGE_SAFETY.md and AGENT_GUIDE.md show the canonical 'pm config project set ids_token_length 6' form; no docs site retains the verb-first-scope ordering

value.note: entropy-budget bullet corrected to scope-first form
entropy-budget bullet corrected to scope-first form

author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: Corrected the invalid verb-first-scope config invocation in MERGE_SAFETY.md and AGENT_GUIDE.md to the canonical 'pm config project set ids_token_length 6' form; verified all remaining docs use scope-first ordering via repo-wide grep.
Agents following merge-safety entropy guidance run a valid command on the first attempt.
Live grammar test: verb-first-scope form exits 2; canonical scope-first and scopeless dotted forms exit 0 and persist ids.token_length=6.

Corrected the invalid verb-first-scope config invocation in MERGE_SAFETY.md and AGENT_GUIDE.md to the canonical 'pm config project set ids_token_length 6' form; verified all remaining docs use scope-first ordering via repo-wide grep.

message: Docs corrected in the same pass; both sites verified against the live grammar.
